nodes.description: Students working in the fields of Wildlife, Environment, Education, Biodiversity, Conservation and related areas are welcomed for doing their Internship at the Zoo. Hundreds of students have participated in various internship programs in National Zoological Park in the last couple of years.

Anyone interested in working for the cause of animals, may apply for the Volunteership Programme of the National Zoological Park by writing in via mail. They will be exposed to in-situ conservation methods, taking care of animals in captivity, and other administrative or peripheral activities that are involved in the upkeep and smooth functioning of a zoo.
